title: Remove Requiem Origin Layer
description: Removes the option to choose between Mortal and Demon when both requiem and origins is installed, keeping the default choice method.
body:
Removes the option to choose between Mortal and Demon when both requiem and origins is installed, keeping the default choice method.

I simply made this because I like the effect of when you first choose to use the requiem mode or not. Uploaded just to make it easier to share.
